title: Good Strategy Bad Strategy
author: Richard Rumelt
description: Distinguish good strategy from bad with 4 Claude Code skills covering the strategy kernel, diagnosing challenges, guiding policies, and coherent actions.
longDescription: Richard Rumelt argues most organizations confuse goals, slogans, and wishful thinking for strategy. These 4 skills teach the structure of good strategy — identifying the kernel that gives strategy its power, diagnosing the critical challenge accurately, formulating a guiding policy that channels effort, and designing coherent actions that execute the policy — so you can cut through fluff and build strategies that actually work.
